title: Kannur University UG & PG Admission 2026-27

detail.title: Kannur University UG & PG Admission 2026-27
detail.short_info: Kannur University PG Admission 2026-27 notification is out. Apply online for M.Sc, MA, MCA, MBA, LLM and other PG courses from 25 April to 24 May 2026. Check eligibility, fees & important dates.

content.text: Kannur University has released the official Admission Notification for UG and PG Degree Programmes for the academic year 2026-27. Applications are invited for various postgraduate and undergraduate courses at different campuses of Kannur University. Online registration started on 25 April 2026, and the last date to apply is 24 May 2026. Candidates can apply through the official website admissions.kannuruniversity.ac.in.
Direct Link to Open Kannur University UG & PG Admission 2026-27: Click Here

sections.heading: Overview of Kannur University UG PG Admission 2026-27

items: M.Sc. Clinical and Counseling Psychology – 2 years (4 Semesters)
M.Sc. Wood Science & Technology – 2 years (4 Semesters)
Master of Physical Education and Sports (MPES) – 2 years (4 Semesters)

sections.heading: Dr. Janaki Ammal Campus, Palayad, Thalassery

items: Master of Library and Information Science (MLib.I.Sc.)
M.A. Music (School of Visual and Fine Arts)
M.A. Malayalam, M.A. Hindi, MBA (Dr. P.K. Rajan Memorial Campus)
M.Sc. Applied Zoology, M.Sc. Plant Science, M.A. Tribal & Rural Studies (Mananthavady Campus)

sections.heading: Important Dates for Kannur University Admission 2026-27
How to Apply for Kannur University PG Admission 2026-27

items: Visit the official admission portal: admissions.kannuruniversity.ac.in
Register and fill the online application form.
